summary: Completed testing of new dashboard pages (StudentDashboard, ParentDashboard, PrincipalDashboard) and verified frontend routing. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Landing page, login flow, and footer with dynamic contact info all working correctly.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width/height -1) - minor issue, charts still render correctly

critical_code_review_comments: New dashboard pages (StudentDashboard, ParentDashboard, PrincipalDashboard) are properly created with data-testid attributes
Routes /student, /parent, /principal correctly redirect to login when not authenticated
ProtectedRoute component properly handles role-based redirects for all user types
MOCKED DATA: Student/Parent/Principal dashboards use mock data since no users of these types exist yet
Footer displays dynamic contact info from /api/public/contact-info endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: New dashboard pages created: StudentDashboard, ParentDashboard, PrincipalDashboard. These pages use MOCK DATA since no student/parent/principal users exist in the system yet. Routes /student, /parent, /principal are protected and redirect to login. To fully test these dashboards, users with roles 'student', 'parent', 'school_principal' need to be created.

landing_page.description: Landing page loads correctly with Nassaq branding

login_flow.description: Platform admin login works correctly, redirects to /admin

/student.description: Route exists, redirects to login when not authenticated

/parent.description: Route exists, redirects to login when not authenticated

/principal.description: Route exists, redirects to login when not authenticated

footer_contact_info.description: Footer displays dynamic contact info (email, phone, address, website)

backend_apis.scheduling: PASSED (400 expected for platform_admin without tenant)
backend_apis.attendance: PASSED (400 expected for platform_admin without tenant)
backend_apis.assessment: PASSED (400 expected for platform_admin without tenant)

mocked_data_note: StudentDashboard, ParentDashboard, and PrincipalDashboard use MOCK DATA for schedules, grades, children data, and school stats. This is expected behavior since no users with these roles exist yet.
